steps.t: Annaben has asked you to pick up a sack of crops from Mileth's home. Her home in Glaniath is north-west of Annaben's waggon.
Annaben has asked you to pick up a sack of crops from Lothwen's home. Her home in Glaniath is west of Annaben's waggon.
You have delivered all requested crops to Annaben. You should talk to her.
